description.en: Open a specific macOS System Settings pane by identifier.
description.es: Open a specific macOS System Settings pane by identifier.
description.fr: Open a specific macOS System Settings pane by identifier.
description.ro: Open a specific macOS System Settings pane by identifier.
description.it: Open a specific macOS System Settings pane by identifier.

inputs.name: Settings Pane

description.en: The settings pane identifier to open
description.es: The settings pane identifier to open
description.fr: The settings pane identifier to open
description.ro: The settings pane identifier to open
description.it: The settings pane identifier to open

inputs.bot: The macOS System Settings pane identifier. Common values: 'com.apple.preference.security?Privacy_AllFiles' (Full Disk Access), 'com.apple.preference.security?Privacy_Automation' (Automation), 'com.apple.preference.security?Privacy_Accessibility' (Accessibility), 'com.apple.preference.security' (Privacy & Security main).
